onboarding.title: Train Your Writing Style
onboarding.description: Create a personalized AI model trained on your manuscripts. Your data never leaves your device.
onboarding.privacyDetail: All training happens locally. Your manuscript is never sent to any cloud service.

library.title: Adapter Library
library.empty: No adapters yet. Train your first style model to get started.

model.description: Choose a base model. Larger models produce better style transfer but require more VRAM and time.

dataset.instruction: Extract your manuscript scenes as training data. You need at least 50 quality entries before training.

params.description: Choose a preset optimized for your use case. DoRA and rslora outperform classic LoRA for style transfer.

training.inProgress: Training in progress… This may take 30–90 minutes.
training.ready: Click Next to begin training with your selected settings.

deploy.title: Training Complete!
deploy.description: Your adapter is ready. Activate it to use in ProForge or the AI writing studio.

writerStyleLight.label: Writer Style Light
writerStyleLight.desc: Quick accent transfer — ~30 min, 8 GB VRAM

deepNarrative.label: Deep Narrative
deepNarrative.desc: Full narrative style — ~60 min, 12 GB VRAM

evaluation.title: Style Evaluation
evaluation.noActiveAdapter: Activate an adapter to run evaluation.

dataset.title: Dataset Builder
dataset.empty: No dataset yet. Extract scenes from your manuscript to create training data.
dataset.notEnough: You need at least 50 accepted entries before training. Try generating synthetic pairs.

errors.pythonNotFound: Python 3 not found. Install Python ≥ 3.10 and add it to your PATH.
errors.insufficientVram: Insufficient VRAM for this preset. This preset requires {{required}} GB.
errors.cloudBlocked: Cloud-hosted models cannot be used for training. Select a local model.
